positive: A stylized celestial forest scene, highly detailed and symmetrical, featuring a cluster of luminescent mushrooms growing around a stylized, glowing full moon and winding roots. Incorporate a palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and soft gold highlights. The composition should be centrally focused, with strong silhouettes and clear graphic divisions, suitable for a seamless apparel print. Use clean line work, elegant vector art style, high contrast, volumetric lighting, magical atmosphere, symmetrical composition, rule of thirds.
